rows.label: qev055105_MSG0001
rows.name:
The Definia's mimicry ability is exceedingly
superior. Unless you pay extreme attention,
it is impossible to see through it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055105_MSG0002
rows.name:
Please be careful as you continue
gathering information. And please,
save our comrade's life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055105_MSG0003
rows.name:
Sun'osaragu is a specialist in
weapon development. If he was
abducted instead of killed...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055105_MSG0004
rows.name:
There is a 67.5% probability that they
intend to brainwash him and force him
to develop weapons once again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055105_MSG0005
rows.name:
Therefore, unless some sort of trouble occurs, the
probability of him being killed is low. Please
rescue him immediately and hand him over to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055105_MSG0006
rows.name:
Even if he has been brainwashed,
we can easily undo such a thing
with our technology.[ST:wait ]
